    A

    AboutDialog - Class in gui
     
    AboutDialog() - Constructor for class gui.AboutDialog
     
    addObserver(MeasurementObserver) - Method in class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Registers a notification observer to listen for real-time measurements and UI updates.
    Aperture - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the instrument's integration window speed aperture settings, determining the balance between measurement resolution and sampling speed.
    applyConfig(LcrMeter) - Method in class lcr.business.ConfigBusiness
    Transmits and applies the current configuration sequence to the LCR meter hardware with necessary stabilization delays.
    applyConfiguration(ConfigDTO) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Suspends the reader thread polling and dispatches a full configuration block payload sequence to the instrument registers in a decoupled thread task.
    AUTO - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.PrimaryParameter
     
    axisChanged(AxisChangeEvent) - Method in class lcr.view.RealTimeChartPanel
